message:
Fix crdt record_resolve witness provenance loss + compaction tombstone refactor

record_resolve: change witnesses.insert() to witnesses.entry().join()
to preserve provenance when a node makes conflicting resolutions
(e.g. both commit and abort). Consistent with record_acquire pattern.

compact: refactor from entry removal to tombstone reduction, retaining
terminal state + one local witness/counter pair so stale Reserved
replicas cannot resurrect completed obligations on merge.

Regression tests: record_resolve_joins_witness_instead_of_overwriting,
compact_prevents_stale_reserved_resurrection. 32/32 crdt tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
